title: Megalo's Metallurgy
description: Adds 50 new metal ores to the game.
body:
Megalo's Metallurgy is a core mod for all of my future Mods. I wanted to start with the lack of metal ore types, so I have expanded them to feature the rest of the everyday metals from the Periodic Table. So Iron, Gold and Copper have 50 new ore friends. All of them have Raw, Raw Blocks, Blocks, Ingots, Nuggets and now Dust.

Dust will be used in the future Addons that are mentioned in the future updates section below.

== Blocks and Items Added ==

Overworld Spawn:

Aluminium, Calcium, Cinnabar (Mercury), Lead, Magnesium, Nickel, Osmium, Platinum, Silicon, Silver, Sodium, Tin, Titanium, Zinc and Zirconium.

Deepslate Spawn:

Antimony, Bismuth, Cadmium, Chromium, Cobalt, Gallium, Iridium, Manganese, Molybdenum, Palladium, Potassium, Ruthenium, Thallium and Tungsten.

The Nether Spawn:

Arsenic, Barium, Beryllium, Caesium, Germanium, Hafnium, Indium, Niobium, Phosphorus, Rhenium, Rhodium, Selenium, Technetium and Tellurium.

The End Spawn:

Lithium, Rubidium, Scandium, Strontium, Tantalum, Vanadium and Yttrium.


== Changes to Vanilla ==

Coal, Charcoal, Copper, Iron and Gold have now got Dust forms.


== Armour and Tools ==

Aluminium, Silver and Titanium make tools and armour.

*The way to make them is completely different from vanilla crafting.

  

== Future Updates ==

Megalo's Metallurgy for Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.20.2 have been started.

*Megalo's Alloys (1st Official Addon) is also in the works.

*Megalo's Nature (2nd Official Addon) is in the planning stage. 

 

== Videos = 

Mod reviewers - Please review my Mod as I would love to know what you think about it. Let me know if you have any ideas on what can be reworked or updated.

 

== Other Information ==

Megalo's Mod is free to use in any modpack, no permission is needed.

 

If anyone wants to make their own addon, just message me beforehand with their idea.

*My future mods are Nature, Tech, Geology and Gastronomy.

 

== Credits ==
All of the textures have been made currently by myself.
